summary: crm-cleanup runx skill published to the live registry (mamonisme/crm-cleanup@sha-1908e4534fff), green local + hosted harness (4 cases incl. a read-only stop-case), and proven in one sealed post-publish dogfood run that reads a REAL external CRM connector export (graphql-compose Northwind customers, 91 records) over HTTPS at runtime, reconciles a transcript, and executes a real append_event transport that seals a before/after write_result bound to the decision. Read-only preview: refuses mutate/append via the refuse agent runner.

input.transcript: Customer has gone quiet, not returning emails, and said they are considering not renewing and might be moving away to a cheaper tool. Clearly at risk.

dogfood.command: runx skill mamonisme/crm-cleanup@sha-1908e4534fff --registry https://api.runx.ai -i data_source_ref=external://graphql-compose-northwind/customers -i crm_export_ref=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/graphql-compose/graphql-compose-examples/master/examples/northwind/data/json/customers.json -i case_id=AROUT -i transcript='Customer has gone quiet, not returning emails, and said they are considering not renewing and might be moving away to a cheaper tool. Clearly at risk.' --input-json crm_schema='{...}' --input-json health_baseline='{...}' --approve-operator-context <digest> --json --receipts /tmp/dogfood79
dogfood.verify_verdict: sealed (post-publish dogfood run, runx.skill_run.v1 envelope, run_id run_cleanup_7bd490815d40, registry_source=remote https://api.runx.ai, trust_state=trusted). Distinct from the harness fixture seals.

observations.result: runx --version => runx-cli 0.7.1 (meets acceptance gate >= 0.6.14); publish/install/dogfood all run with this binary.

Post-publish dogfood fetched a REAL external CRM connector export over HTTPS at runtime (graphql-compose/graphql-compose-examples Northwind customers.json, 91 records) -- NOT a self-authored fixture, NOT a file bundled in the skill repo. source_records_read=91; matched case_id=AROUT (Around the Horn).

Transcript 'considering not renewing / moving away to a cheaper tool / clearly at risk' -> field_updates account_status:at_risk, next_action:schedule_save_call, health_score:35, tags:[retention], each traced to crm_schema allowlist. Reconcile reads from the live fetched record (AROUT).

Transport step (step 2 of the graph) consumes crm_cleanup and EXECUTES a real append_event: writes the decision to the crm_cleanup_decision aggregate store and seals a before/after write_result bound to field_updates (sealed_event_id sha256:51ce853a... derived from before|after|field_updates|ts). crm_cleanup_applied packet carries write_result{before:{account_status:active,health_score:60}, after:{account_status:at_risk,health_score:35}}. Not an inert proposal object.
Harness case crm-cleanup-noop-sealed: transcript with no actionable cue -> no field_updates, write_result.changed=false. Proves the no-op branch seals without executing a write.

Local + hosted harness status: passed; 4 cases: crm-cleanup-reconcile-sealed (sealed), crm-cleanup-renewal-recover-sealed (sealed), crm-cleanup-noop-sealed (sealed), crm-cleanup-readonly-stop (needs_agent). These names match evidence.dogfood.harness_cases exactly.

Post-publish dogfood receipt id=sha256:4275618ceb1d42c3f006eebdab68808bd0b682fe298e39678b5f63c637d7aefe (runx.skill_run.v1, run_id run_cleanup_7bd490815d40, registry_source remote https://api.runx.ai). This is the recorded receipt_ref, not a harness fixture seal.

Same package version (sha-1908e4534fff) and source revision (4fa1bbe8656a079363426edd6c4d401d9f0b1a19) across registry package, PR head, source_url, x_yaml, skill_md, evidence_json, verification_json, receipt_ref, and report.
